title: VRP Discovery Document v0.1
description: Minimum machine-readable discovery contract for a host-owned VRP node. This schema is an interoperability aid, not a registry or trust authority.

operator.description: Who operates the node and holds its signing key, so an agent can reason about exactly what a valid signature guarantees.

role.description: The operator's relationship to the node, e.g. 'infrastructure_provider' (a platform runs the node on the host's behalf) or 'self' (the host runs their own node).

key_custody.description: Who holds the node's Ed25519 signing key. 'platform': the operator holds and operates the key on the host's behalf — offers are signed under the host's domain identity and remain independently verifiable against jwks_url, but the host does not hold the key itself. 'self': the host self-custodies their own signing key. Absent = unspecified; a verifier MUST NOT assume self-custody.

structure_declarations.description: Falsifiable node structure declarations (structure-declarations-v0.1). Keys are lowercase snake_case declaration keys; absent key = Unknown.
